name: Poké Trio /// Train Scenario /// Glaceon, Lucario, and Leafeon friends
description:
My second Dumbass Trio bot, I dunno why I didn't think of this sooner.

____________________________________________

(This retcons some of the events in my Burgerkiss Beach Day scenario, but uh... yeah, idc.)

(Also, I know i'm late to the party, but why the hell were likes and dislikes removed? It kind of defeats the whole purpose for creators getting FEEDBACK on their bots.)

____________________________________________

I tried to add an image for the girls, but uh... I either forgot how to do it, Janitor just doesn't make sense, or they made something stupid and new, (Either way, I'm annoyed.)

____________________________________________

Uh... you're still reading this? Um- BLEH!

(Btw, this was supposed to be a 30 follower special, but then I procrastinated and uh... yeah, now it's a 32 follower special, sorry-)
creator: The_Heartslock_Guy
